brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver transformer aggregating raw.anthropic_economic_index (4,082 rows at task-SOC grain) into base.anthropic_observed_exposure (587 rows at SOC grain). Reads Bronze via DuckDB and base.bls_ooh as a reference set for SOC match flagging and broad-code (XX-XXX0) expansion. Pipeline: (1) normalize SOC codes (strip whitespace, drop O*NET .NN overlay, validate XX-XXXX); (2) drop rows with null/invalid SOC (task_name='none' placeholder excluded here); (3) expand broad codes — for each XX-XXX0 task, if broad exists as-is in BLS keep it, else split its task_pct equally across all detailed BLS codes sharing the same 6-char prefix (preserves global-share invariant through the expansion); (4) group tasks by detailed SOC; (5) aggregate: observed_exposure_pct = SUM(task_pct) across all (task, SOC) rows for that SOC (global-share model — summing preserves the % of Claude traffic interpretation); automation_pct and augmentation_pct = task_pct-weighted mean of per-task axis values; task_count = number of distinct tasks feeding the SOC; (6) flag soc_match=true when soc_code exists in base.bls_ooh; (7) compute deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id(row, ['soc_code'], prefix='aoe'); (8) promote via idempotent append with dedup on record_id. Observed output: 587 SOCs (matches EDA's 588 minus 1 broad code 19-1020 that fails single-target resolution). SOC match coverage: 510/587 = 86.9% — below the spec's 80% P0 threshold as measured against target table, but EDA documents this as a known dataset limitation (Claude traffic skews toward knowledge work; trades/production/transport/food-service have zero Anthropic tasks). No Silver rows are dropped for soc_match=false; the flag is informational for Gold's LEFT JOIN.

documentation.description: Aggregate raw.anthropic_economic_index (task-SOC grain) to base.anthropic_observed_exposure (SOC grain). Uses the global-share aggregation model: observed_exposure_pct = SUM(task_pct) across all (task, SOC) rows for each SOC, preserving the ~100% global invariant from Bronze. Automation and augmentation are task_pct-weighted means per SOC. Broad SOC codes (XX-XXX0) are expanded to detailed BLS codes via the BLS prefix map (with equal task_pct split to conserve the invariant through the expansion). base.bls_ooh is used as a reference for the soc_match flag and for broad-expansion; it is NOT joined row-for-row.

inputDatasetFacets.description: Used to build two lookup structures: bls_soc_set (all valid SOC codes, for soc_match flag) and bls_prefix_map (6-char prefix -> list of detailed codes, for broad-code expansion). Not joined row-for-row; no fields propagate into Silver schema.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash via compute_grain_id(row, ['soc_code'], prefix='aoe'). SHA-256 of the normalized soc_code with 'aoe' prefix. Uses the post-normalization/post-expansion SOC, so broad-expanded detailed codes each get their own record_id.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Multi-path resolution: (1) Bronze soc_code stripped of whitespace and O*NET .NN overlay; (2) validated against ^\d{2}-\d{4}$ — invalid codes drop the Bronze row; (3) broad codes (XX-XXX0) expanded — if broad exists in BLS keep it, else split across detailed BLS codes with matching 6-char prefix (creates multiple Silver rows from a single broad Bronze row). The task_name='none' placeholder row (null SOC) is skipped at step 1.

soc_title.transformationDescription: First non-null soc_title observed per SOC during the grouping pass. Broad-expansion targets inherit the broad code's title when no detailed title has been seen yet.

observed_exposure_pct.transformationDescription: AGGREGATION: SUM(task_pct) across all (task, SOC) rows grouped by SOC (global-share aggregation model). Because Bronze already split task_pct by task-to-SOC fan-out (raw_pct / N), summing here preserves the invariant that SUM(observed_exposure_pct) across all Silver rows ~ 98.22 (= 100 - 1.78 'none' placeholder dropped). Broad-to-detailed expansion additionally splits task_pct equally across detailed targets to conserve the invariant through the expansion. Result clamped to [0, 100] to absorb rounding drift. 0.0 (not None) emitted when all task values are null (spec declares observed_exposure_pct required).

automation_pct.transformationDescription: AGGREGATION: weighted mean of per-task automation_pct values, weighted by task_pct, grouped by SOC. Tasks with higher observed Claude usage dominate the blend. Falls back to a simple mean when all weights are zero/null but at least one automation value is present. None when no tasks contribute a usable value.

augmentation_pct.transformationDescription: AGGREGATION: weighted mean of per-task augmentation_pct, weighted by task_pct, grouped by SOC. Same fallback semantics as automation_pct. Post-aggregation invariant: automation_pct + augmentation_pct + (filtered_pct implied) ~ 100 per SOC (EDA verified mean 1.000000 across 588 SOCs).

task_count.transformationDescription: AGGREGATION: COUNT of distinct tasks feeding the SOC (including tasks contributed by broad-code expansion). Per-SOC task volume range in EDA: min 1, median 4, mean 6.94, max 141 (15-1199 umbrella code).

soc_match.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if the (post-expansion) soc_code exists in base.bls_ooh's SOC set. Informational for Gold's LEFT JOIN; Silver does NOT filter on it. Observed coverage 86.9% (510/587 SOCs) — documented dataset limitation in EDA (Claude usage skews toward knowledge work).

source_release.transformationDescription: Canonical source_release carried from Bronze. When Bronze mixes multiple releases (not expected in practice), the lexicographically-max value wins.

promoted_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Silver promotion via datetime.now(tz=utc). Independent of Bronze ingested_at.

task_id.reason: Aggregated away — Silver is SOC-grain. task_id is available in raw.anthropic_economic_index for lineage tracing.

task_statement.reason: Aggregated away — Silver is SOC-grain. Task text is preserved in Bronze.

task_pct (per-task).reason: Aggregated into observed_exposure_pct (SUM) and automation/augmentation weighted means. Per-task values remain in Bronze.

ingested_at (bronze).reason: Replaced by Silver-zone promoted_at. Bronze timestamp not preserved in Silver.

source_url.reason: Bronze metadata not carried to Silver; recoverable from raw.anthropic_economic_index.

source_method.reason: Bronze metadata not carried to Silver; recoverable from raw.anthropic_economic_index.

load_date.reason: Bronze metadata not carried to Silver; recoverable from raw.anthropic_economic_index.

rowCountLineage.description: 4,082 Bronze rows -> 587 Silver rows. Reduction: (a) 1 placeholder row (task_name='none', NULL SOC) skipped at normalization; (b) 4,081 SOC-matched rows grouped into 587 distinct SOCs (roughly 7 tasks/SOC on average per EDA). Broad-to-detailed expansion can increase row count in edge cases, but only 1 broad code (19-1020) appears in this release and it did not fan out further. Net: 4,081 -> 587 after SOC grouping.
